# Uncategorized OpenBSD System Calls

We don't know anything about 8 OpenBSD (🐡) system calls. Help us categorize these bad boys:

* break
* __realpath
* __pledge_open
* ypconnect
* pinsyscalls
* __tmpfd
* pathconfat
* __threxit
